record_types.name: Time

constants.name: Null_Time
constants.code:
Null_Time : constant Time := (Start => Ada.Calendar.Time_Of (1901, 1, 1),
                              Stop  => Ada.Calendar.Time_Of (1901, 1, 1));

subprograms.name: Gen_Put_Measure

documentation.description: Put the image of the measure

subprograms.name: Gen_Put_Measure_In_Seconds

documentation.description:
Unlike Gen_Put_Measure, puts the measure in seconds only, also puts
9 digits after decimal point.
